recommendations.title: Jerry & Marge Go Large
recommendations.overview: The remarkable true story of how retiree Jerry Selbee discovers a mathematical loophole in the Massachusetts lottery and, with the help of his wife, Marge, wins $27 million dollars and uses the money to revive their small Michigan town.

recommendations.title: Tim and Eric's Billion Dollar Movie
recommendations.overview: Two guys get a billion dollars to make a movie, only to watch their dream run off course.

recommendations.title: There Is a Light
recommendations.overview: Paolo is a sceptical 30-year-old who works unwillingly as a sales clerk in a Turin department store. Mia is a back-up singer in a band and lives her life haphazardly, which leads her to being practically homeless. One night, they bump into each other

recommendations.title: Josephine
recommendations.overview: Josephine doesn't like her job and keeps on having relationships without a future. Her sister and parents keep pushing her to find a good husband. To shut them up, she creates a handsome Brazilian millionaire but her little white lie has a flip side

recommendations.title: I Love You, Stupid
recommendations.overview: Marcos' life turns upside down after he loses the same day his girlfriend and his job. Marcos' life turns wild after to meet Raquel.

recommendations.title: Scent of a Woman
recommendations.overview: An army cadet accompanies an irascible, blind captain on a week-long trip from Turin to Naples.

recommendations.title: Till Luck Do Us Part
recommendations.overview: Check out the hilarious story of luck and misadventures of Tino, a family man whose life is transformed after he wins the lottery. Dazzled by wealth, this boaster spends all his money on a life of luxury and ostentation. But after finding out that he

recommendations.title: The Seduction of Mimi
recommendations.overview: Voting against the Mafia in what he thinks is a secret ballot costs Sicilian laborer Mimi his livelihood. He leaves his wife, flees to Turin and romances a Communist organizer – but he just can’t shake the Mafia. When they lure Mimi back to Sicily wi

recommendations.title: The Organizer
recommendations.overview: In the late 19th century, a former high school teacher turned unionist tries to organize workers laboring with inhuman conditions at a textile factory in Turin, Italy.

recommendations.title: Welcome to Me
recommendations.overview: A year in the life of Alice Klieg, a woman with Borderline personality disorder who wins the Mega Millions lottery, quits her meds and buys her own talk show.
